description: Shell environment policy for YOLOTerm PTY spawning (all tracks)

notes.TERM: xterm-256color maximizes SSH compatibility; POSIX-only (informational on Windows)
notes.COLORTERM: truecolor signals 24-bit color capability to programs
notes.CLICOLOR: Enables color on BSD/macOS tools (ls, etc.)
notes.LSCOLORS: macOS ls(1) color scheme (not set on other platforms, user dotfiles handle it)
notes.TERM_PROGRAM: Identifies the terminal for conditional logic in shell configs
remove: Prevents monochrome TUIs even when renderer supports color (TermGrid bug fixed in 444302f)
notes.CLICOLOR_FORCE: Never set this - corrupts piped output (TermGrid lesson)
